package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for http_response_body_not_drained_before_close: HTTP response bodies that are closed without being drained or otherwise consumed when the response is ignored.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario382Positive(paths []string) error {
	for _, path := range paths {
		file, err := os.Open(path)
		if err != nil { return err }
		defer file.Close()
	}
	return nil
}
